ddls:
CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "state" TEXT /* State abbreviation */,
  "county" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "geoid" INTEGER /* Geographic identifier */,
  "state_fips" INTEGER /* State FIPS code */,
  "vote_dem" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the Democratic party */,
  "vote_rep" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the Republican party */,
  "total_vote" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast */,
  "election_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election year */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout */,
  "third_party_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for third parties */,
  "independent_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for independent candidates */,
  "total_candidate_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes for all candidates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geoid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_county FOREIGN KEY ("county") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_year_id") REFERENCES election_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_code" TEXT /* State abbreviation */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the current governor */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "state_area" REAL /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State abbreviation */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "county_population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  "county_area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the election */,
  "is_presidential" INTEGER /* Indicates if the election is a presidential election */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the election is a primary election */,
  "is_general" INTEGER /* Indicates if the election is a general election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnout record */,
  "election_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election year */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters */,
  "voters_turned_out" INTEGER /* Number of voters who turned out */,
  "voter_turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout */,
  "early_voting_turnout" INTEGER /* Number of early voters */,
  "mail_voting_turnout" INTEGER /* Number of mail voters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_election_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_year_id") REFERENCES election_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Ethnicity distribution */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level distribution */,
  "median_household_income" REAL /* Median household income in the county */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median home value in the county */,
  "median_rent" REAL /* Median rent in the county */,
  "race_distribution" TEXT /* Race distribution in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "econ_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita */,
  "household_debt" REAL /* Average household debt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("econ_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, strategist, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "data_level" TEXT /* Level of data access (e.g., public, internal, confidential) */,
  "access_granted" INTEGER /* Whether access is granted */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "access_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the access expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the report */,
  "election_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election year */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., trend analysis, predictive modeling) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_election_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_year_id") REFERENCES election_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "election_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election year */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "predicted_votes_dem" INTEGER /* Predicted number of votes for the Democratic party */,
  "predicted_votes_rep" INTEGER /* Predicted number of votes for the Republican party */,
  "prediction_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction */,
  "third_party_predicted_votes" INTEGER /* Predicted number of votes for third parties */,
  "independent_predicted_votes" INTEGER /* Predicted number of votes for independent candidates */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the predictive model used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_election_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_year_id") REFERENCES election_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the visualization */,
  "election_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election year */,
  "viz_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, map) */,
  "viz_content" TEXT /* Content of the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line chart, map) */,
  "visualization_title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_election_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_year_id") REFERENCES election_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data provided by the source */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date when the source was integrated */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data source */,
  "source_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
